data.body:
## Description

Create plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md — renamed from dev-onboarding, reads .claude/project-understanding.md, uses Socratic dialogue, removes duplication with /dso:onboarding.

### Requirements:
1. Read .claude/project-understanding.md and skip questions already answered
2. Socratic dialogue for additional understanding (enforcement preferences, anti-pattern risk)
3. No duplicate detection/config sections
4. SUB-AGENT-GUARD (Agent tool variant — dispatches sub-agents for scaffolding)
5. Grounded detection (CoVe) for any additional filesystem checks

### Reference: plugins/dso/skills/dev-onboarding/SKILL.md

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md (create)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md references .claude/project-understanding.md
  Verify: grep -q 'project-understanding.md' plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
